description: Final integration pass: fix all TypeScript errors, ensure all imports resolve correctly, verify the build succeeds end-to-end, and ensure the project is ready for electron-builder packaging.
steps: Run npx tsc --noEmit and fix ALL TypeScript errors across the entire project
Ensure all import paths are correct and all modules resolve (check relative paths, aliases)
Verify all React components export correctly and are imported in their parent pages
Ensure package.json has correct 'main' entry pointing to the Electron main process output
Verify electron-builder.yml has correct file patterns to include all built assets
Ensure vite.config.ts output is configured correctly for Electron renderer loading
Run npm run build and fix any Vite build errors
Verify prisma/schema.prisma is valid with npx prisma validate
Ensure all route files are imported and registered in src/main/server.ts
Verify the Tailwind config includes all content paths for purging
Check that all Framer Motion animations have proper variants defined
Ensure the app renders without runtime errors by checking component structure
acceptance_criteria: npx tsc --noEmit exits with code 0 (zero TypeScript errors)
npm run build exits with code 0 (Vite builds successfully)
npx prisma validate exits with code 0
All files have proper TypeScript types (no 'any' abuse, proper interfaces used)
Package.json scripts are complete: dev, build, start, prisma:generate, prisma:migrate, seed
findings: All verification passed on first run. Only fix needed was adding 'seed' script to package.json scripts section. TypeScript compiled with zero errors, Vite build succeeded (922KB JS bundle), prisma schema valid. All 10 route files properly imported in server.ts. Tailwind config covers all renderer components. useSocket hook fully implemented. electron-builder.yml correctly includes dist/**/*. vite.config.ts uses relative base path for Electron compatibility.
